title: Player Trade Window
body:
Finally a proper player-to-player trading GUI for Minecraft.

Open a list, choose a player, and trade securely across any distance or dimension. Both of you open a synced trade window with two rows of slots per side. Drop items in, watch the other player's offer fill in real-time, hit Lock when you're happy, and once both sides have locked, the Confirm button unlocks. Both confirm and the trade is complete!

![Player Trade Window](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9a9614fb69f60484b659936c62d2c6929f4f5f.png)

## Features


Global Trade Picker: Press K to open a menu to trade with anyone on the server. Includes Search, Favorites, and Recent traders. No more chasing people down.

Non-Intrusive Requests: Requests appear as a corner badge with a countdown timer. Press J to accept or ; to decline.

Two-stage protocol: Lock → Confirm. Either player editing their offer clears both lock states.

Bait-and-Switch Protection: If someone tweaks their offer in the last 2 seconds before you confirm, a popup warns you. No scams.

In-Trade Chat: Chat with the other player directly while inside the trade window.

Equipment Slots: Dedicated slots in the UI to trade away your equipped armor and shields directly.

Custom GUI + Sounds: Cleaner visuals, gold accents, status hints, and audio cues for lock/confirm/complete.

Item-loss protection across every failure mode:

Window closed or players cancel → items returned

Player disconnects or dies → items returned

Server crashes mid-trade → items recovered automatically on next login


Settings Menu: Block all incoming trades, change the request badge corner, or turn off sound notifications.

Admin Tools: Persistent history via /trade history and /trade audit <player>.




### How to use

Press K to open the Trade Picker, search for a player, and click their name. Note: For users who already have this mod installed before the 0.2.0, you might need to bind hotkeys yourself.

The other player gets a corner badge. Press J to accept or ; to decline.

### Requirements

Install on both the server and every client.

Should work with mods like Essential.

### Feedback

Let me know via Discord if you have any feedback!

If you really like the mod and would like to donate, it would be greatly appreciated!

I prefer making mods that actually bring something new to the table rather than reskins of existing content in game, if that's up your alley, any donation would motivate me greatly to make more innovative mods/improve existing mods! If you aren't comfortable donating/can't afford to do so(which is completely fine), sharing and letting others know of the mods will help greatly as well! Cheers!
